questions.statement:
<p>How many triangles are there in the given figure?</p>

<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/18/06/15865.PNG" style="height:176px; width:176px" /></p>
The sum of two numbers is 14 and the difference of their squares is 112. Find those numbers.
<p>Pointing towards a girl, Chetan said &quot;She is the daughter of the only child of my grandmother&quot;. How is Chetan related to that girl?</p>
questions.explanation:
<p><img alt="" src="//storage.googleapis.com/tb-img/production/18/06/14.06.2018.001.JPG" style="height:269px; width:313px" /></p>

<p>Hence, Chetan is the brother of the girl.&nbsp;</p>

questions.statement: The minute hand in a clock moves by _______ minutes in an hour -

<p>Select the number from among the given options that can replace the question mark (?) in the following series.</p>

<p>210, 201, 217, 192, 228, 179, ?</p>

<p>Select the figure from the options that can replace the question mark (?) and complete the pattern (rotation is not&nbsp;allowed).</p>
